scripts.db:animals-sqlserver:up: docker compose --profile mssql up -d --wait animals-sqlserver && node ./scripts/apply-animals-sqlserver-schema.mjs
scripts.db:orders-postgres:reset: docker rm -f db2ai-orders-postgres 2>/dev/null || true; npm run db:orders-postgres:up
scripts.db:animals-sqlserver:reset: npm run db:kill:mssql && npm run db:animals-sqlserver:up
scripts.db:up:all: npm run db:kill:main && docker compose up -d --wait pagila sakila orders-postgres
scripts.db:pagila:reset: docker rm -f db2ai-pagila 2>/dev/null || true; npm run db:pagila:up
scripts.db:sakila:reset: docker rm -f db2ai-sakila 2>/dev/null || true; npm run db:sakila:up
scripts.db:reset:all: npm run db:kill:all && npm run db:up:all
scripts.db:pagila:psql: docker compose exec pagila psql -U postgres -d pagila
scripts.db:sakila:mysql: docker compose exec sakila mysql -u sakila -pp_ssW0rd sakila
scripts.db:animals-sqlserver:sqlcmd: docker compose exec animals-sqlserver /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P "${ANIMALS_SQLSERVER_SA_PASSWORD:-YourStrong!Passw0rd}" -C -d animals
scripts.generate:pagila: node ./scripts/generate.mjs pagila.db2ai generated/tools/pagila-tools.ts && npm run format
scripts.generate:sakila: node ./scripts/generate.mjs sakila.db2ai generated/tools/sakila-tools.ts && npm run format
scripts.generate:sakila-mariadb: node ./scripts/generate.mjs sakila-mariadb.db2ai generated/tools/sakila-mariadb-tools.ts && npm run format
scripts.generate:orders-postgres: node ./scripts/generate.mjs orders-postgres.db2ai generated/tools/orders-postgres-tools.ts && npm run format
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
